reviews.comment:
Fuimos a cargar combustible y a inflar gotas y nos encontramos con que ya no es gratis el servicio de inflado .
Se compra una ficha,  para poder usar el compresor.

(Translated by Google)
We went to get fuel and tire inflation and discovered that the service is no longer free. You have to buy a token to use the compressor.

reviews.comment:
Nafta rebajada de pesima calidad. El Sab 3 de mayo de 2025 cargue el tanque para volver a CABA y a la altura de madariaga ya tenia medio tanque, una locura. Tuve que volcer a cargar en una YPF FULL moderna y pude hacer 130km sin bajar ni siquiera un cuarto de tanque. Ni se asomen a cargar acá, garcas de primera linea.

(Translated by Google)
The gasoline is terrible quality. On Saturday, May 3, 2025, I filled up to return to Buenos Aires, and by the time I reached Madariaga, I was already down to half a tank—it was insane. I had to fill up again at a modern YPF station and was able to drive 130 km without even using a quarter of a tank. Don't even think about filling up here; they're top-notch crooks.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZdnFYaEhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Mi puntuación es por la OFICINA ACA que funciona ahi V. gesell. Si bien quienes atienden resultan amables los últimos dos días vinieron en cualq hrio, por ej el 29 y 30/4 acortaron su jornada habitual q va 10 a 17 a 13 a 16.30. El día 29 está información no estaba y espere 2 horas sin ninguna orientación, y el día 30 ya con ese nuevo hrio la Sra llegó casi a las 14. Hay q atender a q brindan un servicio q no es suplido por otros lugares, y en la costa tenés esta oficina, Mar del Plata o Pinamar q es atendida por ellos mismos. Se entiende q malabarean por ser escaso recurso humano Pero el coletazo lo pagamos quienes somos usuarios. Espero que quien tenga autoridad sobre esta administración tome nota y accione

(Translated by Google)
My rating is for the ACA OFFICE that operates there, V. Gesell. While the people who serve are friendly, the last two days they came at any time, for example on the 29th and 30th/April they shortened their usual hours, which go from 10:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. to 1:00 p.m. to 4:30 p.m. On the 29th, this information was not available and I waited 2 hours without any guidance, and on the 30th, with this new schedule, the lady arrived almost at 2:00 p.m. We have to pay attention to the fact that they provide a service that is not provided by other places, and on the coast you have this office, Mar del Plata or Pinamar, which are attended by them. It is understandable that they juggle due to their scarce human resources. But we, as users, pay the backlash. I hope that whoever has authority over this administration takes note and takes action.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZaUl1bE1nEAE
